hazard_specific_definition: Total counterfactual water-stress loss in grid cells/years where drystress or wetstress annual days are >= threshold; dry and wet categories can overlap if both event masks occur.
note: Period summaries first average each complete GCM-period sample, then report mean, sample SD and normal-approximation 95% CI across GCM samples. Historical has one GSWP3 sample; use gcm_period table for its period mean, and annual_detailed for year-to-year variability.
